# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #

set(_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR
  "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/amdgpu_isa_xml-src"
)
loom_low_descriptor_data_archive(
  NAME
    loom_amdgpu_isa_xml
  SOURCE_DIR
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}"
  URLS
    "https://gpuopen.com/download/AMD_GPU_MR_ISA_XML_2026_03_05.zip"
  SHA256
    "1f17587abc9d0d355cf6f65bdba7496838b4e8313922769199689615c434965c"
)

iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_target_table_cc_library(
  NAME
    gfx11_encoding_tables
  GENERATOR
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/gen/amdgpu_encoding_tables.py"
  SOURCE
    "gfx11_encoding_tables.c"
  HEADER
    "gfx11_encoding_tables.h"
  ARGS
    "--target=gfx11"
    "--descriptor-set-key=amdgpu.gfx11.core"
    "--xml=${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}/amdgpu_isa_rdna3.xml"
    "--public-header=loom/target/arch/amdgpu/gfx11_encoding_tables.h"
  INPUTS
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/gen/amdgpu_encoding_tables.py"
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/target/arch/amdgpu/encoding.py"
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/target/arch/amdgpu/isa_xml.py"

  EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL
)

  NAME

  SRCS

    loom::src::loom::target::coverage

iree_package_name(_LOOM_AMDGPU_PACKAGE_NAME)
set(_LOOM_AMDGPU_CHECK_PROVIDER_TARGET "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_PACKAGE_NAME}_check_provider")

if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  target_compile_definitions(${_LOOM_AMDGPU_CHECK_PROVIDER_TARGET} PRIVATE
    LOOM_AMDGPU_CHECK_HAVE_HAL_RUN_PROVIDER=1
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_LOOM_AMDGPU_CHECK_PROVIDER_TARGET} PRIVATE
    ${_LOOM_AMDGPU_PACKAGE_NAME}_loom_check_requirements
    ${_LOOM_AMDGPU_PACKAGE_NAME}_amdgpu_hal_backend
    loom_src_loom_tools_loom-check_hal_run_provider
  )
endif()

unset(_LOOM_AMDGPU_CHECK_PROVIDER_TARGET)
unset(_LOOM_AMDGPU_PACKAGE_NAME)

iree_executable_test(
  NAME
    "low_packet_diagnostics"
  ARGS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/low_packet_diagnostics.loom-test"
  SRC
    loom::src::loom::tools::loom-check
  LABELS
    "loom-check"
)

  NAME
    "source_low"
  ARGS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/source_low.loom-test"
  SRC
    loom::src::loom::tools::loom-check
  LABELS
    "loom-check"

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_plan
  HDRS
    "wait_plan.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_plan.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_packets
  HDRS
    "wait_packets.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_packets.c"
  DEPS
    ::descriptor_ids
    ::wait_plan
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::target_info
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

  NAME
    occupancy

    "occupancy.h"
  SRCS
    "occupancy.c"
  DEPS
    ::gfx11_descriptors_ids

    loom::src::loom::target::types
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

    wait_plan_test

  CC_LIBRARIES
    "low_registry"
  TARGETS
    "gfx11_descriptors_test"
    "gfx1250_descriptors_test"
    "gfx12_descriptors_test"
    "gfx950_descriptors_test"
    "hal_resource_materialization_test"
    "loom_check_test"
    "low_registry_test"
    "occupancy_test"
    "wait_packets_test"
    "wait_plan_test"
)
